description: SQL constrained-statement caveat — reject cases. sql-write-blocked and sql-escape-blocked are exercised directly; fixedParams pinning is exercised independently of statement-name and escape branches.

statements.name: listen.getConversation
statements.sql: SELECT id, title, source, source_id, source_url, started_at, ended_at, duration_secs, summary, metadata, transcript_json, transcript_text, created_at, updated_at FROM conversation WHERE id = ?

statements.name: listen.listParticipants
statements.sql: SELECT id, name, email, speaker_label FROM participant WHERE conversation_id = ? ORDER BY COALESCE(speaker_label, name), id

cases.reason: Caller supplied a value for fixedParams index 0.

statements.name: listen.getConversation
statements.sql: SELECT id, title, source, source_id, source_url, started_at, ended_at, duration_secs, summary, metadata, transcript_json, transcript_text, created_at, updated_at FROM conversation WHERE id = ?

statements.name: listen.listParticipants
statements.sql: SELECT id, name, email, speaker_label FROM participant WHERE conversation_id = ? ORDER BY COALESCE(speaker_label, name), id

cases.reason: Override of a pinned fixed index — checked before escape detection.

statements.name: listen.getConversation
statements.sql: SELECT id, title, source, source_id, source_url, started_at, ended_at, duration_secs, summary, metadata, transcript_json, transcript_text, created_at, updated_at FROM conversation WHERE id = ?

statements.name: listen.listParticipants
statements.sql: SELECT id, name, email, speaker_label FROM participant WHERE conversation_id = ? ORDER BY COALESCE(speaker_label, name), id

cases.reason: Object/array bind value into a fixed index also trips the pin check first.

statements.name: listen.searchConversations
statements.sql: SELECT id, title FROM conversation WHERE title LIKE ?

cases.reason: Caller-supplied value at a non-fixed bind contains identifier/string escape; node MUST reject before binding.

statements.name: listen.searchConversations
statements.sql: SELECT id, title FROM conversation WHERE title LIKE ?

cases.reason: Non-fixed bind values must be primitive JSON; object/array values are rejected.

statements.name: listen.purgeConversation
statements.sql: DELETE FROM conversation WHERE id = ?

cases.reason: Capability caveat declares DELETE in bound SQL; rejected up-front under the read-only constrained profile.

statements.name: listen.purgeConversation
statements.sql: DELETE FROM conversation WHERE id = ?

cases.reason: Even if the malformed caveat slipped through, invocation MUST be blocked because bound SQL has a write keyword.
